# buildkit_images (Data Source)

Queries a registry repository for images, filtered by a tag regex, required labels, and required platforms.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Query a repository for images matching a tag pattern, required labels, and
# required platforms.

data "buildkit_images" "releases" {
  registry    = "ghcr.io"
  repository  = "org/app"
  tag_pattern = "^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"

  platforms = ["linux/amd64", "linux/arm64"]

  labels = {
    "org.opencontainers.image.source" = "https://github.com/org/app"
  }

  most_recent_only = true
}

output "latest_release" {
  value = try(data.buildkit_images.releases.images[0].digest_url, null)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `registry` (String) Registry host to query.
- `repository` (String) Repository name to query.

### Optional

- `insecure` (Boolean) Allow plain-HTTP / untrusted TLS when contacting the registry.
- `labels` (Map of String) Required label key/values; only images carrying all of them match.
- `most_recent_only` (Boolean) When `true`, return only the most recently created matching image.
- `platforms` (Set of String) Required platforms; only images supporting all of them match.
- `tag_pattern` (String) Regular expression to filter tags. Empty matches all tags.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic id derived from the query.
- `images` (List of Object) Matching images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String)
- `digest` (String)
- `digest_url` (String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `media_type` (String)
- `platforms` (List of String)
- `reference` (String)
